(615) 669-1307LoginDonate

Helping Tennesseans with spinal cord injuries and related mobility disabilities access refurbished wheelchairs, adaptive equipment, and supplies at no cost.

Funded by the Craig H. Neilsen Foundation

Inventory Accuracy

Inventory is updated regularly, but availability may change quickly. Submitting interest in an item does not guarantee that it is currently available or appropriate for your needs. Please contact us to confirm.
